Hot leads

Real-time intent heat scoring

Every visitor gets a live heat score based on their intent, budget signals, and urgency — updated with every message. Know exactly who's ready to buy before they leave.

  • 3-signal EMA scoring: intent, budget, urgency
  • Colour-coded live dashboard
  • Automatic state detection (Research → Ready to Buy)
  • Heat-triggered lead capture forms

Works everywhere

From chat to every platform.

Paste one script tag. CheckFunnel goes live instantly. No developer needed.

🌐 Website 📝 WordPress 🛍 Shopify 🎨 Webflow ⬛ Squarespace

AI you control. Completely.

Supervise your AI. Step in anytime.

Watch the AI qualify prospects — and when a hot lead needs a human touch, take over in one click. No lag, no friction, no dropped context.

👁

Live View

See every active visitor and conversation in real time from your admin dashboard.

⚡

Instant takeover

Take over any AI conversation with one click. The visitor experience is seamless.

🔔

Hot lead alerts

Get notified the moment a visitor crosses your heat threshold — never miss a sale.

Get started in minutes

Deploy fast and with confidence

CheckFunnel learns from your website automatically. You'll see results from the very first conversation.

1

Step 1

Create your AI agent

Add your website URL and CheckFunnel automatically crawls and ingests your content — product pages, FAQs, pricing, everything. Your AI is trained and ready in minutes.

Takes 2 minutes. No code, no uploads, no manual training required.
2

Step 2

Deploy and watch results

Copy one script tag into your site. CheckFunnel goes live instantly — tracking intent, answering questions, and capturing leads around the clock.

Works on any site. WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, or custom HTML — one tag does it all.
3

Step 3

Scale what converts

Use the admin dashboard to see which conversations, triggers, and heat thresholds drive the most leads — then tune your setup for maximum revenue.

Full analytics. Heat scores, funnel stages, lead capture rates, FOMO performance — all in one place.

Impact over busywork

of routine questions handled by AI with no human needed

Your website is ready to sell.
